tickets.note: Kyle Schwarber has gusts carrying balls over the wall, is barreling everything in sight (71% hard-hit), carries elite slug (.343 ISO), gets ideal loft (19°).

tickets.name: The Matinee
tickets.note: Cal Raleigh has the wind howling out behind him, is crushing contact at an elite rate (62% hard-hit), packs elite raw power, a 100/100 grade.

tickets.name: The Allowance
tickets.note: Wyatt Langford is hammering the ball (54% hard-hit), stays in the launch zone (21°), swings one of the biggest sticks on the board (94/100 power).

tickets.name: Cashing Out
tickets.note: Ben Rice is hitting absolute lasers (61% hard-hit), hits for serious power (.308 ISO), gets a sliver of help from the park.

tickets.name: The Slow Grind
tickets.note: Nick Kurtz is scorching the ball (66% hard-hit), swings a .258-ISO sledgehammer, finds the home-run trajectory (18°).

tickets.name: Steady Drip
tickets.note: Rafael Devers is punishing the baseball (61% hard-hit), drives the ball into the air (20°).

tickets.name: Singles Add Up
tickets.note: Brandon Lowe gets a yard playing like a launchpad tonight, is hitting bullets (52% hard-hit), has monster raw power (.26 ISO).

tickets.name: Chip Stack
tickets.note: Casey Schmitt hits it on the perfect plane (21°), carries .228 of real ISO, is centering the ball (49% hard-hit).

tickets.name: The Vig Killer
tickets.note: Willy Adames launches it at the right angle (20°), is putting a charge into it (47% hard-hit), swings with usable power (54/100).

tickets.name: Direct Deposit
tickets.note: Shea Langeliers brings prodigious pop (.245 ISO), puts air under the ball (21°), is driving balls into the gaps (52% hard-hit).
